name: OpenClaw Memory Max
description: SOTA Memory Suite: Auto-Recall Hooks, Cross-Encoder Reranking, Multi-Hop Deep Search, Semantic Causal Graph, Episodic Memory, Utility Vectors, and Nightly Sleep-Cycle Consolidation.

enableRulePinning.description: Enable YAML rule pinning from MEMORY.md into the system prompt. Off by default — must be explicitly opted in.

enableAutoCapture.description: Enable automatic capture of high-value user messages (rules, corrections, preferences) to sidecar files.

enableAutoRecall.description: Enable automatic memory injection before each agent turn.
